
### Human pipeline: laundry 

[]{.my-small} 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-human-pipeline-laundry.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-human-pipeline-laundry.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::


### Waste (1) 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-waste-1.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-waste-1.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::


### Waste (2) 

![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-waste-2.figure.svg)


### Latency --- Time for One 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-latency-----time-for-one.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-latency-----time-for-one.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-latency-----time-for-one.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::


### Throughput --- Rate of Many 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-throughput-----rate-of-many.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-throughput-----rate-of-many.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/laundryPipeline-throughput-----rate-of-many.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::
